creator: jdc@koitsu.org
text:
Thanks.

Since there are no functional NS/A/AAAA changes, I guess there is no point in committing anything.

I'm left wondering why Internic/NetSol/VeriSign/Symantec/WhoeverTheyAreNowDoesAnyoneEvenKnowAnymore bothered to update the comment when there were no functional differences, but that's not a FreeBSD problem.

At least this bug/ticket will act as a documentation if someone else wonders or reports the same.

As such, we can close this out.
